title: Psychotria alto-macahensis

The classification of Psychotria alto-macahensis places it as a member of the genus Psychotria. The plant's classification further categorizes it within the order Gentianales. intro: Psychotria alto-macahensis, also known as Alto Macache or Psychotria, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria alto-macahensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
